subject: re: Tuesday's Critical Deadline
body:
November is about more than just beating Trump | | | |
---
|
# June 30th.
---
| | |
---
| |
> Simona Grace, Founder of Moms in Office with Senator Kirsten Gillibrand.
---
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b61aab163a&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
### **I am asking-**

Moms in Office PAC is up against a critical deadline in just four days. Please let me explain why your support is so critical to us at this moment.

Let's be clear. November is about more than just beating Donald Trump. It is about expanding our majority in the house, electing more women, and flipping the Senate.

Well-qualified, hardworking candidates need our support to get their name out and win our country back. We can't let the ones with the deepest pockets and strongest ties to corporate interest steal this election from us again.

But if we want to win, we need to work harder and make every dollar count. We can't do this without your support.

**Can you join us and[chip](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=f38ef3030f&e=3f151f8b74) in what you can?**

We have a real chance to transform the United States of America and ensure that our kids will grow up in a democracy that we are proud to leave behind for future generations.

It's on us to get this done.

Simona Grace, Founder of Moms in Office
---
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8f1b63bce3&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Another great week!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,

Before I discuss our week on the campaign trail, I want to make sure you know that tomorrow is PTSD Awareness Day. Mental health matters. So does eliminating the stigma associated with mental health and PTSD. An estimated 7.8% of Americans will experience PTSD at some point in their lives, including about 30% of service members who have spent time in war zones. We lift up those who are struggling, we remember those we have lost, and we pledge to work together to make our world a better place for everyone.
---
|
---
|
### ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL
---
| It was another busy and exciting week on our campaign for Congress. To celebrate by birthday, I partnered with The Birthday Party Project. Thank you to all who donated to this great cause to help make sure that kids across our country can enjoy the excitement of a birthday party.

Little things like having a birthday party can make an incredibly significant impact on a child's life, so I am very grateful to all who chipped in and contributed.

Later in the week, I spent an afternoon with the Good Samaritans of Garland at their excellent Shred Hunger event.

Today I stopped by a one of Feed Me Pronto's local neighborhood popups. This is a local small business that provides healthy and fast meals for busy families in our district.
---
|
---
---
| During these times, it's more important than ever that we pitch in to help out our local communities, get involved whenever we can, and support the local businesses that make our district such a great place to live, work, and raise a family.

I hope you have a great weekend, and I look forward to keeping you up to date with everything that goes on in the coming week!
---
| Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32
---

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: It has to stop.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Riots in the streets, defacing Wisconsin history: just another line in the Democrat playbook... No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pttuljl-ahkdjtlkr-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pttuljl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,This week in Wisconsin, our capital city was torn apart by rioters who defaced our State Capitol building and assaulted a state senator. Just like their D.C. colleagues, **Madison's Democrat leaders sat by and did nothing while Wisconsinites were attacked, and our history was destroyed.**This isn't the kind of leadership we need in our state's capital or our nation's capital. I hope you'll join me, and send a message to Madison and Washington, D.C. that they can't ignore. [Join Fitz - $5](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pttuljl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join Fitz - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pttuljl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) The chaos that happened in Madison this week is what Nancy Pelosi and her liberal D.C. allies call a "peaceful" protest. Just like their Madison counterparts, they're sitting by and refusing to condemn this violence. **It couldn't be more clear that from Wisconsin to Washington, the Democrats are more interested in playing politics than in keeping our communities safe. ****It has to stop.** Help me send a message that Wisconsin residents are sick of these political games. **Wisconsinites want law and order, not more chaos and destruction.**Scott Fitzgerald

name: Team Messner
subject: FEC deadline next week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
We have an important deadline coming up in a few days. Will you help? Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1b57bebbbe4e21a2/d0a310ddad60e870c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, The FEC deadline for our end-of-quarter is just a few days away, and Corky needs your help. We still need to raise a final $15,769 to meet our fundraising goal by midnight on June 30. **[Will you help by chipping in now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1b57bebbbe4e21a2/30ae5b7e0d17c57ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** It’s important that we reach our goals if we want to win our primary and beat Jeanne Shaheen this November. Every dollar we raise helps us reach conservative voters and get them to the polls. Corky has been endorsed by President Trump, because the President knows he will fight for families and small businesses in the Granite State and across America. He’s an outsider and a businessman, not a career politician. Corky built his business from scratch, so he understands that the government doesn’t create jobs. People create jobs, and government needs to remove burdensome obstacles so that everyone can get back to work and pursue their American Dream. **[Will you donate $5 to meet our FEC deadline?>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1b57bebbbe4e21a2/39d0f60a0c04d7cfc3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

clean_body: We have an important deadline coming up in a few days. Will you help? Read more >> Peter, The FEC deadline for our end-of-quarter is just a few days away, and Corky needs your help. We still need to raise a final $15,769 to meet our fundraising goal by midnight on June 30. It’s important that we reach our goals if we want to win our primary and beat Jeanne Shaheen this November. Every dollar we raise helps us reach conservative voters and get them to the polls. Corky has been endorsed by President Trump, because the President knows he will fight for families and small businesses in the Granite State and across America. He’s an outsider and a businessman, not a career politician. Corky built his business from scratch, so he understands that the government doesn’t create jobs. People create jobs, and government needs to remove burdensome obstacles so that everyone can get back to work and pursue their American Dream. We need to keep the momentum going on our campaign. Corky has been reaching out to voters via tele-town halls, and holding Zoom meetings with supporters. But we need to keep going. After all of our spring in-person fundraising events were cancelled due to COVID-19, we’ve fallen short on our fundraising goals. If everyone reading this pitches in, we’ll be able to get back on track. Thanks for your support, Team Messner | | | ---|--- id:2020-06-17-20:45:55:144t PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

Matt Gaetz has been a vocal advocate for conservatives since day 1, despite Nancy Pelosi and the liberal machine's best efforts to stop him. But he has never shied away from a fight... ...So we can't either! _This is huge, team._

**A new poll shows that Eugene is just three points shy --_within the margin of error_ \-- of Scott Perry. **

**This isn’t a surprise:** Since the start of this campaign, we have seen overwhelming enthusiasm on the ground for Eugene’s style of leadership. When people learn about Eugene’s story, they understand why the issues South Central Pennsylvanians are facing are so personal to him -- from combating opioid abuse to lowering the cost of health care.

**We can’t take our foot off the gas now. These numbers show that when we get our message out, we win.**_And we can’t do that without you, team._
[**We are rapidly approaching our important FEC fundraising deadline in just a few days and need to raise another $14,483 to meet our end-of-quarter goal. When people learn about Eugene’s story, they understand why the issues South Central Pennsylvanians are facing are so personal to him -- from combating opioid abuse to lowering the cost of health care. We can’t take our foot off the gas now. These numbers show that when we get our message out, we win.And we can’t do that without you, team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Eugene has spent his career fighting for Pennsylvania families, while Scott Perry has prioritized his special interest campaign contributors in DC. With four months until the election, this poll is a clear indication that our team has the grassroots strength to take on Perry and his special interest backers. = Thank you, \--Team Eugene Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. Chip in any amount to help Eugene flip PA-10 blue in one of the most competitive races in the entire country. | = | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. Box 1822 York, PA 17405 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Catching up on Childhood Immunizations
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
A few weeks ago, I announced that Dr. Alexander Scott would be convening a COVID-19 Pediatric Advisory Council to inform our approach to children's health issues and to support our pediatric offices during this difficult time. That council has convened several times over the last month to help us examine the effects of this pandemic and guide our steps going forward. The results are clear: we are behind in immunizations, and we need to catch up. We've seen concerning drops in childhood immunizations, lead screenings and child wellness visits over the last several months.
Today, I want to talk to you about how we can ensure that our children are safe and healthy even during this pandemic.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KsgbDzebu_nVv4-c0yppurTntLK1vFCfmU8bwOWoKFFyEtN5CThSz_aAe1_8mZXOgHQb6q3fFuVf7S5GWxRMns_9JSFRXHuFcea6hkqFWDZjpoaMnK1pDkE8gaVVfpDmWkud_dNZbO8BFQwSUdjQ2o8gOgSGPP2VqSwtEkwAhdstcGPcf8qlw1jEEefyxcaBCX3t0lmk91g=&c=YMegJcFfD8bW7tPtP1YHzATlM94JT8lUA3FWbXxuAbHe6hyQXSfcmw==&ch=rwQj2_tmLBV32ignweA-G7dw17C4X1dFNgSVtnqsixmyM93ce99oKg==)
---
| If your child is under 2 years old, or age 4, 11 or 16, and needs a vaccine, or if they have missed a child well visit or lead screening during the last several months, please call their doctor and make an appointment to be seen before your child returns to school in September. In April and May, we saw 52% reductions in immunization rates for kids between ages 2 and 7. We can't accept that.
You should know that our pediatricians are taking extreme caution - keeping waiting rooms clear, using PPE, conducting infection control, and requiring screenings. These protections are specifically designed to mitigate risk of exposure to the virus. The bigger concern at this point is not going. And if you or your child are currently uninsured, you can reach out to our health insurance exchange, at 1-855-840-4774 to learn more about coverage.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KsgbDzebu_nVv4-c0yppurTntLK1vFCfmU8bwOWoKFFyEtN5CThSz4LsFEvM86zfIAM9ubvIdaPfPheZupSiN4LdSU5Tc8IK8QoSjTU49hQESzyC5Yn3hiJ3Pt0bGrumdSmn4_NZU6OtUygtgu88w4gPJRINnc7n4rGZo3LmBugxRqza5DRHp20n2xGO3J1zpKu9ppfxr6E=&c=YMegJcFfD8bW7tPtP1YHzATlM94JT8lUA3FWbXxuAbHe6hyQXSfcmw==&ch=rwQj2_tmLBV32ignweA-G7dw17C4X1dFNgSVtnqsixmyM93ce99oKg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KsgbDzebu_nVv4-c0yppurTntLK1vFCfmU8bwOWoKFFyEtN5CThSz4LsFEvM86zfIAM9ubvIdaPfPheZupSiN4LdSU5Tc8IK8QoSjTU49hQESzyC5Yn3hiJ3Pt0bGrumdSmn4_NZU6OtUygtgu88w4gPJRINnc7n4rGZo3LmBugxRqza5DRHp20n2xGO3J1zpKu9ppfxr6E=&c=YMegJcFfD8bW7tPtP1YHzATlM94JT8lUA3FWbXxuAbHe6hyQXSfcmw==&ch=rwQj2_tmLBV32ignweA-G7dw17C4X1dFNgSVtnqsixmyM93ce99oKg==).
---
| As we head into this weekend, I'm counting on each and every Rhode Islander - every business owner, every resident -- to own their shared responsibility to protect public health. That means making sure you're keeping 6 feet of social distance from others, wearing your mask, washing hands and always staying home if you're sick. We're doing a good job of avoiding the spikes that other states are seeing, but we can only maintain that if we all do our part to keep ourselves, our families, and our neighbors safe.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KsgbDzebu_nVv4-c0yppurTntLK1vFCfmU8bwOWoKFFyEtN5CThSz_aAe1_8mZXOSnojMKf2A1N90WxqwgotxPJMBpEt0C9uGNdQVsQOIZf8Y2-fK4GpFGPoftsKQdfNJtzmBjIWuIQToxZerSZ5Xn8fkQfixs_wpduU7cWC-CpZ8MHY6srRcJBlmG9KAcijN8QqYYqpHB9uMGewdZcSbuFOTe9m3ZxUJoIRmEQwnrQk1wf-8wEdCKllEmGEQe8BopMJw7Dy1LpxUrNS6pHVaeYNj4Klj4NA-XH09jd0BsTuB8C1jvkaTshDRzKaJTyTbJUOfCRBLBPwbaS4vdE6n_Tsw4qjU9KauCNEUunwXjewIgOzFprrx_PSCWvy1go_DayOPtNotA2WYCV2I-J05fyLaeqpgsOkYtZw81mdYD3HzW0inh6ZBzXW-Ff8b0O-&c=YMegJcFfD8bW7tPtP1YHzATlM94JT8lUA3FWbXxuAbHe6hyQXSfcmw==&ch=rwQj2_tmLBV32ignweA-G7dw17C4X1dFNgSVtnqsixmyM93ce99oKg==).

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
For far too long, corruption from Washington has dominated politics. Corporate special interests have bought and paid for the candidates of their choice, and policy outcomes that are contrary to Kentucky values.

|

Corporate special interests have bought and paid for the candidates of their choice, and policy outcomes that are contrary to Kentucky values. Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. Hi Peter,
My mom raised me by herself and had to face a lot of financial and emotional turmoil due to my father.
There were times she’d hide me and my brother in the back of our house because there’d be people with guns trying to find my father at our doorstep.
She’d always tell me that what was going on in our house was no one else’s business. That’s what poverty does. It isolates us. We never realize that most of us are silently suffering together.
There’s a myth in our society that, if you’re not homeless, you’re not actually poor.
At the same time, nearly 8 out of 10 Americans live paycheck to paycheck.
That’s a broken wrist, a couple blown tires on your car, or a busted pipe in your apartment putting you in financial trouble.
**That’s poverty.**
That’s what we’re fighting at Working Hero.
Check us out below to learn more about our story, how we fight, and how you can too.
Talk soon,
Joe
| [Let's End Poverty Together!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18039780/214897761/-2147125543?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyNTIyMmIzLThkYjgtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M4fy_jfYIBIn46qBPMCyHRptALsTBOMwDYMbqH8J_38=&emci=9280f7df-79b1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=425222b3-8db8-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=7114755)

#
Hi there, Archie here — Tina’s husband. Things are very different from the last time we talked, and I know these times are challenging for a lot of us. I hope you and your loved ones are doing alright. Tina and I have been practicing social distancing and staying home, and trying to get a few walks in. As you probably would have guessed, Tina’s working around the clock and fighting her heart out to help Minnesotans survive this crisis. Except now, she’s doing it from home, with help from Moose and me. But that’s just Tina. I’ve always been blown away by how hard she works and how dedicated she is to helping others. Now, she needs our help. Tina is facing an important fundraising deadline in just a few short days. Listen, I was serving up burgers when I first met Tina. We were in grad school, and now we’ve been married for more than 35 years.
When we moved to Minnesota the summer we got married, we were in our twenties with mounds of school loans and a beat-up orange car with no defroster.
We were the kids driving with the windows down at 20 below to keep ice from forming on the inside of the windshield!
I just want you to know how proud I am of Tina. I wish everyone could see her as I do — the woman who loves her friends and family, bakes pies for our birthdays, laughs a lot, and wears her heart on her sleeve. We have always supported each other, and now I’m glad I can be the one who makes sure she eats dinner when she's home (though I still don't understand why she doesn't love my famous country risotto).
As a Senator, Tina is working as hard as she can to help the people of Minnesota and folks across the country. Fighting for affordable health care, paid sick leave, and so much more. That’s why I’m asking:

clean_body: | Hi there, Archie here — Tina’s husband. Things are very different from the last time we talked, and I know these times are challenging for a lot of us. I hope you and your loved ones are doing alright. Tina and I have been practicing social distancing and staying home, and trying to get a few walks in. As you probably would have guessed, Tina’s working around the clock and fighting her heart out to help Minnesotans survive this crisis. Except now, she’s doing it from home, with help from Moose and me. But that’s just Tina. I’ve always been blown away by how hard she works and how dedicated she is to helping others. Now, she needs our help. Tina is facing an important fundraising deadline in just a few short days. It’ll mark the end of this critical quarter, and it’s also when we’ll launch the next phase of this campaign — which brings me to why I’m reaching out to you today: Can you chip in to support Tina’s campaign before the FEC fundraising deadline? | _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Protecting our Majority this fall doesn’t mean just supporting our Democrats who are already in the House, but also continuing the utmost important task of flipping more seats blue.

TX-22 is one of our very best pick up opportunities in the entire country, and Sri Kulkarni is a candidate of the highest caliber. His history of serving our country as a Foreign Service Officer and dedication to protecting access to health care, a woman’s right to choice, and our constitution -- are just some of the many reasons why we _must_ bring him to Congress.

But make no mistake, friend: Sri is going to need your full support to beat the corporate special interests and win in November.

clean_body: Hey y’all! Matt Krausse here, Mike’s Digital and Communications Director. I have an update for you on our big goal to hit $35,000 in the last few days before midnight on June 30th. But first, I want to tell you why this goal is so important. Our campaign has always been a field-first campaign. We thrive on going out to the doors and talking to voters where they are. While we are dealing with the COVID-19 pandemic, we are making sure to keep communicating with people in the safest way possible. That means more mail, TV, and digital and we are having to raise a lot more to do the outreach we need to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = I'm working hard on this campaign because I know Mike will fight for healthcare, racial justice, workers’ rights, and our climate when he is in Washington. I know he will because this is the work he has done his whole career. Whether it is taking on corporate landlords discriminating against tenants, confronting racist policing policies, or standing up for voting rights, Mike has always put people first. In 2018 Mike swung this district 15%. Making this one of the top targets for Democrats in 2020. Now, we are going to finish the job. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = In solidarity, Matt Krausse, Digital and Communications Director ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Clarke Tucker
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRog-qBq4fafHc8cedJsP81Hn9OmBgyLrI6xLhdJ8uk=/ZBXG-R2J97a6EASiXT9VyPB3vqykde8g1NRSxZTybG0=)

Dear friend -

I hope you and your family are safe and well.

We're nearly halfway through 2020, a year that has brought unimaginable hardship and pain to families across the country. Over 100,000 people have died in America due to the coronavirus pandemic, and with it, we've seen mass unemployment and economic turmoil.

This already trying time has been underscored by a long overdue national reckoning with the generations of systemic racism and injustices perpetuated against Black Americans.

2020 is truly testing the strength of America and our people. By testing us so much, it's almost as if the challenges we face are showing us the depth of our strength.

While we've certainly seen instances of opportunism and divisiveness, we have also seen incredible resilience, compassion, strength, and dignity from our fellow Americans and Arkansans every day. Frontline workers risking their lives for their patients; people wearing masks and socially distancing to protect the vulnerable in their communities; friends, neighbors, and complete strangers doing good and extending a hand to people in need; millions of people marching in all fifty states, demanding justice for George Floyd and equality for Black Americans.

Over the last few months, we have seen an outpouring of love, an infusion of introspection, and a determination to do and be better, especially when it comes to finally seeking real racial justice in America. And in just the last two weeks, we've seen monumental Supreme Court cases come down on the side of progress and justice, for our friends who are in the LGBTQ+ community and who are Dreamers.

None of this means that things will be easy going forward. But I do believe it means that with a continued compassion and commitment to working with and for each other, we will get through these trying times. And if we do it right, then we have a shot at taking some important steps toward America living up to its promise.

Please stay safe, continue to look out for one another, and always stand up for what's right.

Sincerely,

Clarke

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRog-qBq4fafHc8cedJsP81Hn9OmBgyLrI6xLhdJ8uk=/ZBXG-R2J97a6EASiXT9VyPB3vqykde8g1NRSxZTybG0=)

Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
---
Clarke Tucker for State Senate
PO Box 7268
Little Rock AR 72217 United States

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Defending Equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Yesterday marked five years since the Supreme Court ruled that all people — no matter their gender or sexual orientation — have the right to marry.

While this milestone in love deserves to be celebrated, true equality for the LGBTQ community has still not been enshrined into law.

That's why I am calling on the Senate to pass the Equality Act, which would expand nondiscrimination protections for LGBTQ folks beyond the workplace and into other sectors like healthcare, housing, credit, education, and public services.

Will you join me and stand in solidarity with the LGBTQ community by demanding the Senate pass the Equality Act now?

Thank you and Happy Pride,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

clean_body: I wanted to fill you in on new developments with our campaign from the past week Friend, this was a make-or-break week for our campaign, and I can’t thank you enough for your support at the ballot box on Tuesday! Thousands of conservatives came out from across our district to make NY-22 great again – and because of you we’re on to November 3rd! ⬇️ MUST-WATCH VIDEO FROM THIS WEEK ⬇️ Elise Stefanik and I Need Your Help to Flip NY-22 From BLUE to RED! We’re just over four months away from Election Day – and we MUST start working now to flip our district from BLUE to RED, send Anthony Brindisi packing, and make NY-22 great again! Elise and I fought together with President Trump once, and we’re ready to do it again – are you in?! Help Elise and I make NY-22 great again | | Brindisi Voted With Pelosi Against Our Police – But We’re Not Surprised! Democrats on both sides of Capitol Hill are up to their old political games as they hurt our police departments and endanger our communities – and Anthony Brindisi sided with Nancy Pelosi against our district once again! It’s time for common-sense police reform to heal our nation, but we won’t get that with Democrats in charge of the House. View and share the post | We’re On To November 3rd – And I Can’t Thank You Enough! NY-22 came out in droves on Tuesday to say one thing loud and clear: It’s time for a leader – not a Pelosi puppet! Anthony Brindisi votes with Pelosi 90% of the time, he voted to impeach President Trump, and he prioritized illegal immigrants over American citizens at a time when we needed leadership most to combat COVID-19. We must put an end to this in November. View and share the post | Rep. Steve Scalise is Helping Us Keep Gov Cuomo Accountable - In a BIG Way! “Our investigation centers on Gov. Andrew Cuomo’s decision, on March 25, to force nursing homes to accept known COVID-positive patients while also prohibiting homes from even testing patients for COVID-19 prior to admission. name: Alice, Team Warner Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: We need to start STRONG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Even though our campaign kickoff looks a little different this year, our ask is the same: can you help us send Mark Warner back to the Senate?
|
---

| | **General Election season starts NOW** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d415/53d9897e/545cb2ea/1c8849b4/3058344287/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200627_f_1_nd__630__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---

Derek --

**It 's official: Mark Warner is Virginia's Democratic nominee for Senate!** Normally, we'd host a big event to kick off fundraising as we head into the general election. To keep people safe during the ongoing pandemic, most of our campaigning has to be online. Even though our campaign kickoff looks a little different this year, our ask is the same: can you help us send Mark Warner back to the Senate?

**[We need to reach 1,000 new donors by the end of the month to keep this campaign going strong. Pitch in now to give Mark a boost.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d415/53d9897e/545cb2ea/1c8849b4/3058344287/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200627_f_1_nd__630__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")**

Although Mark Warner is a proven and tireless advocate for the people of Virginia, his re-election is NOT certain. I know -- I was there with him in 2014, when he won by less than a single percentage point.
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d415/53d9897e/545cb2ea/1c8849b3/3058344287/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200627_f_1_nd__630__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
---
We're not taking anything for granted in this campaign:
* Donald Trump has repeatedly said he's personally targeting Virginia.
* Republicans are making major investments in the Commonwealth.
* The Trump Victory Initiative is pouring money into Virginia and organized more than 90 events across the Commonwealth just last year.
* FiveThirtyEight ranked Virginia as **_completely even_** in its partisan leaning, and now Real Clear Politics has designated us as a "tossup" state in the 2020 election.

We're going to need all hands on deck from now until November 3rd to make sure that we keep Mark in the Senate, fighting for _every_ Virginian. **[Will you help Mark's campaign start strong by getting us to our 1,000 new donors goal by Tuesday?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d415/53d9897e/545cb2ea/1c8849b2/3058344287/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200627_f_1_nd__630__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

Thank you so much,

Alice, Team Warner Deputy Campaign Manager

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d415/53d9897e/545cb2ea/1c8849b2/3058344287/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200627_f_1_nd__630__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d415/53d9897e/545cb2ea/1c8849b1/3058344287/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:

Last time we fell behind our grassroots team stepped up to the plate and got us back on track, but the stakes are even higher today. **Can you help MJ out?**

name: Ethan Gruber
subject: Volunteers needed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hey Peter, It's hard to believe July is almost here, and almost harder to believe that we are _less than 130 days away from the election._ It will be here before we know it, which means now is the time to really kick off our volunteering and we need your help! We have some fun and easy volunteer opportunities coming up that can really make a difference over the next 4 months as we head towards November. Click the links below to sign up or feel free to e-mail me with any questions! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/_vJ2AK7iBkdlJFO4KcvZosXgOKBiMl6H9cOQJm7UeZA=) [Call friends and neighbors](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/DXcgdVwlsL8Khu_MUKz3Q2yzhxigKFoSAT7hA5J6pSE=) \- We have plenty of shifts for you to call voters around the district to share why you're voting for Betsy and why this election is so important. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/_vJ2AK7iBkdlJFO4KcvZosXgOKBiMl6H9cOQJm7UeZA=) [Host a virtual event ](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/lSLztX84pUcH25vPJmyOTKb0KyE15cQJdtievJkRDZw=?subject=Event%20for%20Betsy&body=Hello%20Ethan%20-%20I%20would%20love%20to%20host%20a%20virtual%20event%20or%20fundraiser%20to%20help%20%20get%20Betsy%20elected.%20Could%20you%20send%20me%20more%20information%3F)\- We take care of the technical stuff & you simply invite your network to an online event where Betsy can share her vision for Ohio. E-mail me if you're interested! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/b5rQPsMGfjMvycVqiftWFVvgR5hNwZMmD_Sx0HeX5D0=)[Digital volunteer](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/b5rQPsMGfjMvycVqiftWFVvgR5hNwZMmD_Sx0HeX5D0=) \- Share social media posts and information from the campaign with your friends to spread the word. Thanks so much for your help in winning this seat. It's so greatly appreciated. Sincerely, Ethan G. _Campaign Manager_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/eKCuFADkOXIHJKh0wPuX4jb8H1MJBboUE6UJ6H6FSK4=?refcode=6.27) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/QJ7nXPzPZSmOZF_EH8tpgz1m2Y-bEanw6CGuh84cgw8=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/Dt94SejZD9wkFHUJW18MmruNpDxq4KDKHBDE8V6JCaI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/lKuRjXOjZatzIhuaNlAo5DNWxt4MQzTDnHI-F0Kmrco=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pY3C36k9WUDgPu2f49cW03UjydPPckLjru6YRY5QZRI=/sGRaNHfjHd1JrJa5kGE5QMQ8zJtpgRX14nUMUnrxwpo=)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Ticket to Mogadishu
body:
I know what my opponent, Congresswoman Lois Frankel has done with her eight years in office.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381710-899488-5063360-78bf0257c1-b7cb7feccf)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381710-899488-5063359-80257b338a-b7cb7feccf) I know what my opponent, Congresswoman Lois Frankel has done with her eight years in office.

**Want to hear it?**

Aside from voting in lockstep with Nancy Pelosi, **Lois Frankel wrote ONE bill that passed**.

The bill?

**Lois Frankel’s bill denounced “female genital mutilation.”**

Frankel used taxpayer’s money to write a bill to fund something already denounced and considered ABHORRENT in American society.

Frankel would have been move effective moving to Somalia, Ilhan Omar's country of origin, and working with local warlords and religious leaders to stop the practice that’s so popular there.

And I’m hoping that after the November Election, Frankel will have the extra time to do just that . . . **I’ll even buy her a ticket to Mogadishu**.

Washington needs new leadership. We know that.

We need members of Congress who focus on solving America’s problems – **not ones who go on international junkets to search for problems to fix around the world**.

Help me send Lois Frankel packing and [**help me hit our fundraising goals for the second quarter of 2020**.

**I’m asking you to be one of 500 patriots who step up today and[pitch in $10 to help me win](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381710-899488-5063359-80257b338a-b7cb7feccf).**

[**Please donate now.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381710-899488-5063359-80257b338a-b7cb7feccf)

Thanks again for all that you do and thanks so much for taking the time to read my email on a Saturday!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381710-899488-5063359-80257b338a-b7cb7feccf)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-381710-899488-84585d41bbe610b-b7cb7feccf)

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/eb71691c5a1f/calling-all-patriots-12547338?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9e18fe6d63&e=795c6d9796)

| | [FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4cb00dc623&e=795c6d9796 "FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE")
---
| Peter, **Today is the last day of early voting! Polls are open until 2:00 pm.**

As you know, every vote truly matters. Please take the time to vote TODAY in the Republican Primary for the 5th Congressional District or on Election Day, this Tuesday, June 30th. And be sure to remind a few friends.

**< < [Find your voting location here.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=781b79fac4&e=795c6d9796) >>** As you know, Janet is the best candidate to BEAT liberal Democrat Kendra Horn and stand with President Trump in Washington. Also, if you have any time between now and when the polls close on Tuesday, we could definitely still use [volunteers](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=764292c124&e=795c6d9796)! Please respond to this email or sign up here: [https://janet2020.com/volunteer/](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f31db4f1a7&e=795c6d9796). We need people to call, block walk, and work the polls. Thank you!

Sean Rose
-Team Janet

P.S. [Be sure to watch and share our latest TV ad! Janet will stand with President Trump to build the wall and put America First.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c965c8f9c1&e=795c6d9796)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations=20&=20Roza=20Calderon?=
subject: Andrew Romanoff is the secret weapon to flip Colorado US Senate!
body:
Future Generations proudly endorses GND champ Andrew Romanoff - a bold leader who will deliver on a comprehensive climate action plan! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=91950c9241&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
---
|
## FG endorses Andrew Romanoff for U.S. Senate Colorado
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8f06c8376d&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
|
---
| [DONATE TO A GREEN NEW DEAL CHAMPION](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=935a54b8cf&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO A GREEN NEW DEAL CHAMPION")
---
| FG is proud to endorse environmental champion Andrew Romanoff. Andrew is ready to take bold climate action with his **[comprehensive plan to combat the climate crisis](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=91d58d1104&e=66979298f9)**. We are down to the wire and need you to make the most of the next 3 days to defeat "fossil fuel darling" John Hickenlooper to advance to November and defeat Republican Sen. Cory Gardner.
---
| [JOIN ONE OF OUR DIALING PARTIES!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3ba101fa8a&e=66979298f9 "JOIN ONE OF OUR DIALING PARTIES!")
---
| [DIAL FOR ANDREW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8774220c95&e=66979298f9 "DIAL FOR ANDREW!")
---
| _"We are honored to be endorsed by Future Generations. We're in lockstep with their seventh generation principle that the decisions we make today should result in a sustainable world seven generations into the future. We look forward to working side by side in our fight to save the planet with the Green New Deal.”_ \- Andrew Romanoff
---
| [INVEST IN FUTURE GENERATIONS](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=6988d1883b&e=66979298f9 "INVEST IN FUTURE GENERATIONS")
---
|
---
| Andrew Romanoff is best known for serving as Speaker of the House for Colorado and is now a powerful voice for safeguarding Future Generations. We like him because he represents our generations movement to secure a just and vibrant future.

On the campaign trail and long before Romanoff has been a champion for issues of racial justice, environmental justice and class equity. To hold himself to these standards, he hasn't taken a dime from corporate interests and is leading a powerful progressive vision for the future of our economies.

One of Romanoff's most notable contributions to the State's electoral history was his work leading the State of Colorado's Legislature to a Democratic Majority in both chambers.

**Andrew Romanoff has been a champion for progressive ideas and will be an environmental champion in the US Senate. **

His opponent, nicknamed "Frackenlooper" is one of the worst environmental Democrats in the Nation. Perhaps Rolling Stone said it best, "What Lieberman was to antiwar Democrats, Colorado’s Hickenlooper is to environmentalists". And its true. Hickenlooper has a truly terrifying record on environmental issues.

It is our hope that with your help we can elect Andrew Romanoff to the US Senate.

[Can we count on you to join us, 350 Action, Sunrise Movement, along with many environmental groups nationwide who have lined up to elect Andrew Romanoff to the US Senate this Tuesday?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=6eb70fdab7&e=66979298f9)
---
| [DONATE TO A GREEN NEW DEAL CHAMPION](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0a055d3387&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO A GREEN NEW DEAL CHAMPION")
---
| |
---
It is an honor to work with Future Generations and youth across the country to ensure our leaders are standing up for Indigenous communities by building strong diplomatic relationships around the world and who understand that our relationship with the environment is undeniably interconnected with economic, racial, healthcare, and housing justice here at home. We must focus on policy that will deliver a sustainable and just world seven generations into the future.

Roza Calderon
Executive Director
[Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=2d48c78cc1&e=66979298f9)
---

Future Generations PACPO Box 1861Olympia, WA 98507-2394

subject: friend, the best is yet to come
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We need to get back to work, create more jobs, raise wages, improve schools, build better roads, and much, much more. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b36726f52b714b228caf64e8784a4b0b&_e=08GaGm4Qp_cHb5jDMmGE8XJKYTUf_ZXSLxu9r8QIdc9w2c4LhvccbFU0hX-WI3thJc515Xrqv7Xtfy82_Y3vhIaBw_cZnF3e4sCQIZQSyRb9wka0Cf6Yzzn6RuxmPSPLsr8otRVz1z99of1EiJ3olx-npCSTUM_ocQ6cl35WMSOJ-6R79A4wWHZ6iQ9JpmOjcohxYHAe8OfF0A5in6diGvXiVESa2ZlzGWaFXMHI6m10suotqkYP8ST7QcAPjf-bbvKiDLUdvBW3pfoaFq2C3dFsHN0nfNLF8czNFACMbj3IWGCB1wzcPGZYkrHBMRnjX3VGQoOwGzxSa7lazVpucppNTIl06fE8oq2deBVc3vFePVQerrsMb-DaquYSi7hlJfx_caEqP2Q58xFM-npz7vhlVUlZEB8Uw3YuGhdAebI%3D) |

friend,

Eric laid out his vision of One Indiana at the 2020 Indiana Republican Convention last week, and he made one thing crystal clear.

**The best is yet to come for Hoosiers across Indiana. **

_Before the COVID-19 pandemic, we set records for job creation, wages, international investment in our state, and investments in our roads and bridges. We lowered the infant mortality rate, fought the drug epidemic, expanded education, and much more. _

_And trust us, we’ll be setting records again before you know it. _

We have work ahead of us to truly become One Indiana — but we know that Hoosiers love a challenge. We need to get back to work, create more jobs, raise wages, improve schools, build better roads, and much, much more.

We can’t turn back the clock — we need to move forward.

And to do that, we need your help. friend, we need you to be all in.

That’s why this quarter, we’re asking you to join us on our mission to build One Indiana.

**[friend, will you chip in just $10 and commit to building One Indiana with Eric over the next four years? We’re asking you to put some skin in the game and help Eric continue to set records for another four years.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b36726f52b714b228caf64e8784a4b0b&_e=08GaGm4Qp_cHb5jDMmGE8XJKYTUf_ZXSLxu9r8QIdc9w2c4LhvccbFU0hX-WI3th7Q69MzNeXYzZwSMI-5nyZ5kThzK_z_8nk87mkA3VMkB4Urv2eqym4tJIvMHB5r9bJHUFoeu0kX9mVbxtFXFkZX27oK1CQqAUdLUxmfX81ey8q4gEbAN_wI0DmrlTqy429T4z782YZeMa7n6QNUTXdjYFHWE6AyRG-I3tmpR6zsucBCkDNakxvM-zMhl3zHJHfX-RIDYeNwsRyPKeq3sXbnF4QfWzYOot7kgYFAbbqnUZih-he97AcCTP1r1RinTRy2eniTDffqlh3rFqGYEWkNB03kCbfPGTu7jLtD3cuMTHNLJ3_B9irh0GGYBQBRc8bXFqxQ0ARTS7tlo2pUHaYXv5K7txy4Z0DgkSumzKC8A%3D)**

name: Tracy Newman
subject: Let's talk numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The RGA has millions to spend. We need to be prepared.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8081%2E868730%2E1GdwMb) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8081%2E868730%2E1GdwMb)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, Let's talk numbers -- it is my job, after all. I head up fundraising for Jay, so I'm looking at the numbers all day long. Not just our fundraising numbers but our opponents' too. That's why it's important to note that the Republican Governors Association raised a total of $53.1 million in 2019 to flip a total of four governorships. Four out of 50 -- and Jay's seat is one of them. **Donald Trump's victory in 2016 has proven no campaign is safe, and no election win is certain. Republicans and Donald Trump will go all out to defeat Jay, and we have to be ready.[That's why our $50,000 official end-of-month goal is so important. We're halfway there, at just under $25,000 -- will you donate $5 or more right now to help close the gap?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9234?t=5&akid=8081%2E868730%2E1GdwMb)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9335?t=6&akid=8081%2E868730%2E1GdwMb)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9236?t=7&akid=8081%2E868730%2E1GdwMb)

---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9239?t=10&akid=8081%2E868730%2E1GdwMb)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9234?t=11&akid=8081%2E868730%2E1GdwMb)
---
These last few months, Donald Trump has focused his wrath on Democratic governors like Jay, who are doing their jobs well.
From tweets threatening a military coup in Washington state to TV appearances where he simply calls Jay a "nasty person," nothing is off-limits for this president. And we know wherever Donald Trump goes, his Republican allies follow -- we have to fight back.
Republicans have already bought air time for this fall -- and with tens of millions of dollars on hand, there's no telling what disinformation they'll start to spread.
**[We need to be prepared, and that's why we need to raise $50,000 by our end-of-month deadline at midnight on Tuesday: Donate $5 or more right now to help the campaign prepare for Trump's and the GOP's attacks yet to come in this race.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9234?t=12&akid=8081%2E868730%2E1GdwMb)**
Thanks,
Tracy
Tracy Newman
Senior Advisor
Inslee for Washington

name: Tina Smith
subject: I’m a grandmother!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hello — I am about to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the United States Senate. But first, I just have to share the good news...I’m a grandmother! This month, our family welcomed Ari Michael Smith (a bundle of pure joy!) into this world. Looking at his eyes and his cute little nose, I can’t help but think of how we got here. My first job in Minnesota was at General Mills. My husband Archie and I moved to St. Louis Park, had two children, and found our life here. All of this to say, with everything that’s going on and all of the life changes we have had over the past few weeks and months, I’m reminded of why I decided to go into public service in the first place. I didn’t run for public office for fame, money, or power. I ran because I wanted to ensure a better future for my kids (and grandkids!) and make a difference in people’s lives. And folks just like you supported me because they wanted to make a difference, too. I've spent so much of my life fighting for the people of Minnesota and folks across the country, but I have so much work left to do. So, here’s the part where I ask for your help: **Will you add a donation to support my campaign for U.S. Senate before the FEC deadline? I need your help to keep our team on track for our ambitious goal of 25,000 grassroots donors. Your contribution today would mean the world to me.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18044522/215006355/1016186834?refcode=tsm-em-200627&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ0Y2IzMS1iN2I4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0CqXGAZA8MpNYuiOOIOjcjL6w79d3I-POtD1qB4nBlE=)

clean_body: | Hello — I am about to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the United States Senate. But first, I just have to share the good news...I’m a grandmother! This month, our family welcomed Ari Michael Smith (a bundle of pure joy!) into this world. Looking at his eyes and his cute little nose, I can’t help but think of how we got here. My first job in Minnesota was at General Mills. My husband Archie and I moved to St. Louis Park, had two children, and found our life here. All of this to say, with everything that’s going on and all of the life changes we have had over the past few weeks and months, I’m reminded of why I decided to go into public service in the first place. I didn’t run for public office for fame, money, or power. I ran because I wanted to ensure a better future for my kids (and grandkids!) and make a difference in people’s lives. And folks just like you supported me because they wanted to make a difference, too. I've spent so much of my life fighting for the people of Minnesota and folks across the country, but I have so much work left to do. So, here’s the part where I ask for your help: Will you add a donation to support my campaign for U.S. Senate before the FEC deadline? I need your help to keep our team on track for our ambitious goal of 25,000 grassroots donors. Your contribution today would mean the world to me. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support makes an incredible difference for our campaign and my work for the people of Minnesota. Every penny you give allows me to continue fighting for our values in Washington — and if we're successful, I'll get the chance to continue our important work. I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you I can count on. I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am that you're a part of this. But please, only give if you can afford to do so. Thank you. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota To receive exclusive campaign updates, text TINA to 30311 and subscribe to our texts! Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
They couldn't be more different, and let me tell you why.
|

| | **BEFORE THE FEC DEADLINE:
[_If you can, chip in today ->_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa13d/18d6a294/4c934a7c/26d7f0e4/2341569293/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA2MjciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200627?refcode=jme200627_m_other&refcode2=107423")** It's like night and day -- James and his opponent Bill Hagerty couldn't be more different. **Hagerty is running to serve the wealthy and well-connected.** That's why he's already raked in more than $200,000 from corporate PACs, scored himself a multi-million dollar loan from his friends at the bank at the same time small businesses struggled to secure assistance during COVID-19, and has folks like Tom Cotton and Alternative Facts Kellyanne Conway supporting him. **James is a combat veteran** who is dedicated to serving his country. That's why he got into this race, and that's why he's not taking any money from corporate PACs. [_**Washington is already filled with insiders like Hagerty who are only there to serve special interests. James is in this race to change how things are done in the Senate, but he can 't do it without you. subject: The fight for CD 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Nancy Pelosi is prepared to spend millions backing my radical opponent. Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469402?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

I won’t mince words. Indiana could determine where control lands in the U.S. House of Representatives – and whether we can finally kick Nancy Pelosi out of the Speaker’s chair once and for all.

I know that my race in the 5^th District could be the decision-maker, and I’m up for this challenge.

Our state Republican chairman, Kyle Hupfer, reached out to me and asked how Hoosiers can help in my battleground race.

My answer was simple: We need proper resources to fund a strong grassroots campaign.

The Democrats are determined to keep their House majority, but we can’t let that happen. We must take it back and we must win this seat.

Kyle told me that his grassroots team (which includes you!) has a track record of winning across the state, so that’s why I’m reaching out to you. Can you help by chipping in what you can now?

Donate $5 NOW!>> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $10 NOW!>> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $25 NOW!>> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=25&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $50 NOW!>> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=50&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $100 NOW!>> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=100&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $250 NOW!>> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=250&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate what you can NOW!>> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We have an important deadline coming up at midnight on June 30. It’s the end-of-quarter fundraising reporting deadline, and the funds we raise will determine our budget to reach voters leading up to the 2020 elections.

We have to reach out to conservative voters and get them to the polls in November.

We can’t let the socialist Democrats win.

Will you please help by donating today? Click here to donate. (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Thanks,

Victoria Spartz
Donate Now >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq3-062520?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=The_fight_for_CD_5&amount=&mc_cid=1ab0878c43&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Friend,

**America is in uncharted waters right now – and that calls for unprecedented action.**

Statues of American heroes – Theodore Roosevelt, Abraham Lincoln, and George Washington are being defaced and torn down every day – but that’s not all that’s being torn down.

Institutions and pillars of our American society which have stood for decades – even centuries – are under attack as I write this, and our nation needs **patriots** to step up and defend them.

_**I’m talking about our universities, our police departments, and even Congress.**_

Progressive Democrats want to defund our police departments, but they’re dead set on policing what we think about and speak about on our college campuses. This flies in the face of what our First Amendment stands for, and I’m not going to sit back and allow it to happen.

**Congress is the root of this problem – and we have a chance to change that in November!**

**[CHIP IN $17.76 TO LIBERATE CONGRESS](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ae5e15d265624bbaa8c6610f76250e4b&_e=QLVBrYC4JF_Z1RXjHhaTagXFOtPgTzzM_APQet6YJIhytAzVyRyDG3huPrQ5kcnTBOp17yX_GxxgBG4K-LIQNAgdFoZZ2gd7Ks0b6heCjcBm0QSBpMoCrfVhhwlMIX2aNhRntTDsT7MR0RRHOy3O-zSaGJgNLg5LEYvcpavwIYHVviziLQX6Kbig-1SYyWZdqCpYa-XXCeTSaXoNYMRZuwjgBjLeqsGi5eWFzoBFqsmUJH8MEo_z-JQJX8iCNRXzI3Ukx7l2AuObQ5xQmfhtOjv4x7mV9p9OFMZoN7Q0MqxFT4LZ0BuuuL3uoHTt4krfYEqE7tVp1IPWAm9WO5prpKC0aj7T-5RicN5TtfViJIx-ItuBXbD1TBpe612wVK2Pp_6TiW2OCEoNXdInRLRsk13Czkia3PPmD431rEmeLQaL99EaY6vRpS2VQwoi1xG1K5rHnSZljmyJbGRV1h47UOaoL9KcOWDU_g7QtHC0Rz3q-3c8C4gV_fO5Ljijpz4_)**

Capitol Hill has been overtaken with House Democrats that have deep pockets and shallow morals, and they’ll stop at nothing to dismantle anything that stands in the way of their agenda.

I’m one of those obstacles standing in their way but with our quarterly fundraising deadline approaching on **June 30th** , I need your help to keep standing in the way so that we can liberate Congress from the Democratic agenda this year. **Are you with me, Friend?**

**[CHIP IN $17.76 TO LIBERATE CONGRESS](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ae5e15d265624bbaa8c6610f76250e4b&_e=QLVBrYC4JF_Z1RXjHhaTagXFOtPgTzzM_APQet6YJIhytAzVyRyDG3huPrQ5kcnTBOp17yX_GxxgBG4K-LIQNAgdFoZZ2gd7Ks0b6heCjcBm0QSBpMoCrfVhhwlMIX2aNhRntTDsT7MR0RRHOy3O-zSaGJgNLg5LEYvcpavwIYHVviziLQX6Kbig-1SYyWZdqCpYa-XXCeTSaXoNYMRZuwjgBjLeqsGi5eWFzoBFqsmUJH8MEo_z-JQJX8iCNRXzI3Ukx7l2AuObQ5xQmfhtOjv4x7mV9p9OFMZoN7Q0MqxTqkx74cWnGQVZ8vKHPeuF-1zIzN8HPAwtiHCiLVmIziXXB1-qWI0eDLsP5l23yE7OdHH1hH-boJKURHbhwpxIjwmHS0lhX7XX0SOYL3AAfTYCvkRXOkcyyRzf7lqPS-SFhkRih-XO0RiovBTJ7Ztvoppgo1LKch95n1EVl5TEvXki3xhKFm-6IxtZTSME5SZ9QUHtObMWwEwWWLAgzo1t)**

We didn't meet Thursday's goal and now we're _at risk of falling behind_ our quarterly goal. We really can't afford to slip up now, just days before we file our FEC report. Experts and potential supporters will be looking to determine if we have a fighting chance against Senator Cornyn.

**[But here's the good news: this grassroots team has the power to help us get back on track and knock this end-of-quarter goal out of the park. Can I count on you?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890192/7f51f7bc/41572606/4ef63abc/2222794534/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200627.2nd__1606__&amount=10")**

**[Let's do this!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890192/7f51f7bc/41572606/4ef63abc/2222794534/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200627.2nd__1606__&amount=10")**

body:
Only days remain until Susan's End-of-Quarter deadline and she needs YOUR help. While Susan is working tirelessly to get things done for Maine and our country, she needs her supporters to step up. The Far Left has no plans to slow down now -- and neither can we.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4MjkwNjUS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjMzNjc3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4MjkwNjUS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjMzNjc3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4MjkwNjUS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjMzNjc3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter -- only 3 days remain until Susan's End-of-Quarter deadline and she needs YOUR help.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends --
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Senator Maggie Hassan's campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here is the truth:
In less than one week, we close the books on the most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign.
Shortly after this deadline ends, we are going to release not just how much money we've raised, but how many donations we've received. We'll share them with the media and we'll share them with you -- and we're going to do it whether the numbers are good or if they're not.
Everyone is going to be looking. They are going to want to see if we can keep up our individual donation momentum. They want to see if we'll have the resources we need to win.
Right now we're still short of our donation goal before the end of this FEC deadline, and we need A LOT more donations to get there before it's too late.
Can you help?
[**Split a $3 contribution between my campaign and Maggie Hassan before our June FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5ab/2a380d31/238abfe8/f091e9/2132716145/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDYyN19NV0g0TUsxX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20200627_MWH4MK1_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Our people-powered campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you. So thank you for being part of our team. Victory in this race is only possible with you.
All my best,
Mark Kelly
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5ab/2a380d31/238abfe8/f091e9/2132716145/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDYyN19NV0g0TUsxX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20200627_MWH4MK1_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas=20for=20Texas=20House?=
subject: Defend the Police
body:
I’m sure you’ve seen by now the radical left’s dangerous idea to Defund the Police. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/defend-the-police-june-27-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2a84899ad6&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Hi friends,

I’m sure you’ve seen by now the radical left’s dangerous idea to Defund the Police.

I was recently interviewed by [The Hill](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=84dc106800&e=4f010155df), a national publication based in D.C., where I was able to share some of my thoughts on this issue:
_Will Douglas, a biracial GOP candidate running for Texas’s 113th State House District in Dallas, called the push to defund police departments “absurd” in an interview with The Hill.

“I haven’t spoken to any voter who thinks that defunding or abolishing the police is a rational idea,” Douglas said.

“I do believe that there needs to be reform around procedures and how confrontation is handled,” he said. “It’s something that I think both sides can agree on, but unfortunately those on one side of the aisle want to take money away from them.” _
If you agree we need to DEFEND the police, not DEFUND them, please [contribute $20.20](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2c3c2772f0&e=4f010155df) to my campaign right now so we can continue spreading that message.

I am proudly endorsed by the Dallas Police Association, and I will never stop being an advocate for police in the Texas House. Police officers around the country put their lives on the line every single day in the name of keeping us safe — they deserve our full support.
---
| For Texas,
Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113
---
|
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=4657a661e9&e=4f010155df "CONTRIBUTE")
